data.content: Created Obsidian architecture note at /Users/cartine/obsidian/foolery/Hosted Foolery Cloud Service Architecture.md. The note defines Foolery as a three-plane hosted system: control plane, execution plane, and model plane. It recommends ephemeral sandbox workers with checked-out repos and local tools, provider-agnostic model routing, customer-owned Git as the default hosting mode, and a stable internal runtime contract so existing coding CLIs can be used early without becoming the long-term product architecture.
